mapper.sql:
SELECT S.sys_id, S.sys_nm, S.sys_type, S.sys_status, S.org_code, S.charger, S.tel_no, S.reg_dt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER_INFO) AS user_cnt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BOARD_INFO WHERE board_use_yn = 'Y') AS board_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY S.sys_id DESC) AS rsn FROM TB_SYS_INFO S WHERE S.sys_status = 'O'
AND (S.sys_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR S.sys_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_SYS_INFO WHERE sys_status = 'O'
AND (sys_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sys_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_SYS_INFO WHERE sys_id = #{sysId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_SYS_INFO ( sys_id, sys_nm, sys_type, sys_status, sys_purpose, org_code, template_id, template_type, intro_yn, establish_dt, charger, tel_no, reg_id, reg_nm, reg_ip, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{sysId}, #{sysNm}, #{sysType}, 'O', #{sysPurpose}, #{orgCode}, #{templateId}, #{templateType}, #{introYn}, #{establishDt}, #{charger}, #{telNo}, #{regId}, #{regNm}, #{regIp}, GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SYS_INFO SET sys_nm = #{sysNm}, sys_type = #{sysType}, sys_purpose = #{sysPurpose}, org_code = #{orgCode}, charger = #{charger}, tel_no = #{telNo} WHERE sys_id = #{sysId}
UPDATE TB_SYS_INFO SET sys_status = 'D' WHERE sys_id = #{sysId}
mapper.select: SELECT domain_seq, sys_id, sys_domain, use_yn FROM TB_SYS_DOMAIN_INFO WHERE sys_id = #{sysId} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY domain_seq
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_SYS_DOMAIN_INFO SET use_yn = 'N' WHERE domain_seq = #{domainSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT D.dept_seq, D.org_code, D.dept_code, D.dept_nm, D.reg_dt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER_INFO WHERE dept_nm = D.dept_nm) AS user_cnt FROM TB_DEPT_INFO D WHERE D.org_code = #{orgCode} ORDER BY D.dept_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DEPT_INFO ( org_code, dept_code, dept_nm, reg_id, reg_nm, reg_ip, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{orgCode}, #{deptCode}, #{deptNm}, #{regId}, #{regNm}, #{regIp}, GETDATE() )
